entity.label: En-gannim
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town in the plains of Judah (Josh. 15:34), north-west of Jerusalem, between Zanoah and Tappuah. It is the modern Umm Jina.

nodes.label: En-gannim
nodes.description: A town in the plains of Judah (Josh. 15:34), north-west of Jerusalem, between Zanoah and Tappuah. It is the modern Umm Jina.

verses.text: And Zanoah, and Engannim, Tappuah, and Enam,
